name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The blue-collar Trump boom
body:
The economy has been red hot since President Donald J. Trump took office. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2d48ccb15&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 12, 2019
---
| | |
# **The blue-collar Trump boom**

**The economy has been red hot** since President Donald J. Trump took office. That’s great news on its own. But even better is that not all booms are created equal—and the blue-collar Trump Economy is paying off for exactly the working Americans who need it most.

**Last year** , Council of Economic Advisers Chairman Kevin Hassett reported that blue-collar jobs [grew at their fastest pace](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f4c403f29&e=3ee4985eea) since 1984. And now, “after years of job losses, U.S. manufacturing employment has risen for 18 straight months among those holding production or nonsupervisory jobs, the longest stretch of gains since the mid-1990s,” _The Wall Street Journal_ wrote this month.

**More good news today:** “Real wages for American families are soaring,” the White House Council of Economic Advisers reported this morning. Hourly earnings rose by 1.9 percent in the past 12 months—far exceeding even last year’s pace.

**Complementing those rising wages** is a significant drop in prices. American families are paying less at the pump as gasoline prices fell 9.1 percent during the past year. And in keeping with a major promise from President Trump, last month saw the biggest year-over-year decline in prescription drug costs since 1972.

**February’s jobs report,** released Friday, revealed that the unemployment rate fell to 3.8 percent last month, remaining near a 50-year low.

**Behind these numbers** is a renewal of hope among working-class families and blue-collar communities across the heartland. Nearly 70 percent of Americans told Gallup they expect their personal financial situation to be even better next year. Their employers are optimistic, too. On average, a stunning 91.8 percent of manufacturers feel positive about their companies’ future growth under President Trump, compared with an average of 68.6 percent during the last two years of the Obama Administration.

[Americans credit President Trump as the economy continues to soar](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3be5972ba&e=3ee4985eea)

**The latest:** [February jobs report shows wage growth is the fastest since 2009](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=829eca19fc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The First Lady takes “Be Best” across America**

**First Lady Melania Trump** made a three-state swing last week, taking her “Be Best” message for child well-being to Oklahoma, Washington state, and Nevada.

**The first stop** was [Dove School of Discovery in Tulsa](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5014ba69c0&e=3ee4985eea), one of five public charter schools that aims to provide a character-development curriculum in every classroom from pre-K to the 12th grade. The First Lady participated in an activity with pre-K children that encouraged young students to think about ways they can show kindness in their lives.

**On the topic of online safety,** [the First Lady visited Microsoft Headquarters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b3036e438&e=3ee4985eea) in Redmond, Washington, seeing firsthand how Microsoft is taking the lead on promoting online safety for children and parents. “The technology being designed not only includes safety features but also accessibility for all – a very exciting and new opportunity for many with limited mobility,” Mrs. Trump said.

**In Las Vegas, Nevada,** the First Lady took her message of fighting opioid addiction into her [second town hall with Eric Bolling](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1b2a564dc&e=3ee4985eea). “This campaign will give a voice to those affected by the opioid crisis by allowing them to share their stories and Eric Bolling was one of the first to share his family’s story, inspiring hundreds more who have followed his lead,” the First Lady said.

[See First Lady Melania Trump visit the Dove School of Discovery](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d14861026d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Video of the Day
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccf1e2fa91&e=3ee4985eea)
---
**First Lady Melania Trump Attends an Opioid Town Hall in Las Vegas, Nevada**
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9852ff6bf9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e310054dc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aefb33e3c9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Win dinner with President Trump

body:

President Trump personally asked me to unlock a short-term DOUBLE-ENTRY offer just for you to double your chances, Friend.

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Exciting news! (MSNBC Town Hall)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
Make sure you tune in to Kirsten's first live TV town hall.
| | | [](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a8c/2ae112ef/114b0fe8/357d3a12/989239395/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
---
Peter,

I'm thrilled to tell you that Kirsten will be joining Chris Hayes on MSNBC for her first TV town hall on Monday, March 18!

| | [Join us for Kirsten's MSNBC Town Hall](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a8c/2ae112ef/114b0fe8/357d3a1d/989239395/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4Njctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/msnbctownhall?source=jtk2867-ot-gfp-nd")
---

Kirsten is taking this campaign directly to the voters to answer questions and earn your support. She's built her career fighting for what is right, especially when it's hard--and we can't wait for Kirsten to bring her courage and compassion to the stage. You won't want to miss it.
Our team is sending out a reminder where to tune in day-of. Make sure you're in the loop and RSVP here:
[**https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/msnbctownhall**](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a8c/2ae112ef/114b0fe8/357d3a1d/989239395/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4Njctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/msnbctownhall?source=jtk2867-ot-gfp-nd")
Thanks, as always, for your support!

Stefanie
National Finance Director
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a8c/2ae112ef/114b0fe8/357d3a1f/989239395/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Give the Border Patrol a Break
body:
"A new report from the U.S. Border Patrol proves that only the willfully ignorant can doubt that we’re dealing with an immigration crisis." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2367215a64&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Give the Border Patrol a Break**

“A new report from the U.S. Border Patrol proves that only the willfully ignorant can doubt that we’re dealing with an immigration crisis,” Dr. Ed Feulner writes in _The Washington Times_. “Border Patrol agents apprehended more than 66,000 migrants at the U.S.-Mexican border in February. That’s the highest total for a single month in almost a decade.”

“The entire system right now is at full capacity,” agent Manuel Padilla said. “Actually, it’s overwhelmed.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d50c0189a5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “On Thursday, the Senate will take up the House resolution to disapprove of the president’s emergency declaration. The question is simple: Do you believe, as President Trump does, that we have a crisis on the southern border that must be addressed to protect American families?” Sen. James Inhofe (R-OK) writes in _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd30dc60b6&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The refusal of Democrats to give our Border Patrol agents and our immigration enforcement officials the resources they need to secure the border puts all Americans at risk. They left the president with no choice but to declare a national emergency, and he is on sound legal footing.”
---
|
---
| “In May 2016, a group of national health experts issued an urgent plea in a private letter to high-level officials in the Obama administration,” Scott Higham, Sari Horwitz, and Katie Zezima report for _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65886b22e7&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Thousands of people were dying from overdoses of fentanyl — the deadliest drug to ever hit U.S. streets.” Yet “despite mounting deaths and warnings, the Obama administration did not take extraordinary measures to confront an extraordinary crisis, experts say.”
---
|
---
| “National Guard troops helped with the arrest of 23,034 illegal immigrants and the seizure of more than 35,000 pounds of drugs in the roughly six months they were deployed to the border in fiscal 2018, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection,” Anna Giaritelli reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5daa02e85&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| Former Vice President Joe Biden “criticized President Donald Trump’s proposed 2020 budget for doing what his own administration asked for in their time at the White House. Biden decried the budget, saying, ‘Did you see the budget that was just introduced?’” Saagar Enjeti writes in _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d5e4d0924&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The proposed reductions to Medicare exactly mirror the same mechanism proposed by the Obama administration.”
---
|

clean_body: "A new report from the U.S. Border Patrol proves that only the willfully ignorant can doubt that we’re dealing with an immigration crisis." | | | | | | | Give the Border Patrol a Break “A new report from the U.S. Border Patrol proves that only the willfully ignorant can doubt that we’re dealing with an immigration crisis,” Dr. Ed Feulner writes in The Washington Times. “Border Patrol agents apprehended more than 66,000 migrants at the U.S.-Mexican border in February. That’s the highest total for a single month in almost a decade.” “The entire system right now is at full capacity,” agent Manuel Padilla said. “Actually, it’s overwhelmed.” | | “On Thursday, the Senate will take up the House resolution to disapprove of the president’s emergency declaration. The question is simple: Do you believe, as President Trump does, that we have a crisis on the southern border that must be addressed to protect American families?” Sen. James Inhofe (R-OK) writes in . “The refusal of Democrats to give our Border Patrol agents and our immigration enforcement officials the resources they need to secure the border puts all Americans at risk. They left the president with no choice but to declare a national emergency, and he is on sound legal footing.” | | “In May 2016, a group of national health experts issued an urgent plea in a private letter to high-level officials in the Obama administration,” Scott Higham, Sari Horwitz, and Katie Zezima report for . “Thousands of people were dying from overdoses of fentanyl — the deadliest drug to ever hit U.S. streets.” Yet “despite mounting deaths and warnings, the Obama administration did not take extraordinary measures to confront an extraordinary crisis, experts say.” | | “National Guard troops helped with the arrest of 23,034 illegal immigrants and the seizure of more than 35,000 pounds of drugs in the roughly six months they were deployed to the border in fiscal 2018, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection,” Anna Giaritelli reports in the . | | Former Vice President Joe Biden “criticized President Donald Trump’s proposed 2020 budget for doing what his own administration asked for in their time at the White House. Biden decried the budget, saying, ‘Did you see the budget that was just introduced?’” Saagar Enjeti writes in . “The proposed reductions to Medicare exactly mirror the same mechanism proposed by the Obama administration.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: DWS for Congress
subject: Friend, we aren't backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
time to step up
|
---
| | | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c2d/622b7b5b/1efe54e0/307b4f20/981170360/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=10&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")
Friend,

As a member of the House Oversight Committee, Debbie is doing the important work of investigating President Trump's activities and connections. From this point forward, the administration WILL be held accountable.

The GOP isn't happy about that, so they're preparing an onslaught of attacks to try and take back the House in 2020. [**_We need to ramp up our fundraising immediately to hit our first end of quarter goal of the year on March 31. Can you help us close the $5,500 gap?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c2d/622b7b5b/1efe54e0/307b4f23/981170360/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=10&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+ramp+up+our+fundraising+immed&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c2d/622b7b5b/1efe54e0/307b4f22/981170360/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=10&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**************[Donate $10 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. ******[Donate $50 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")******

**********[Donate $100 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")******

******[Other amount](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=8+-+Other+amount&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")********
When the American people went to the polls in 2018, they sent a clear message: They want Democrats to lead. And friend, that's what Debbie is doing. But she needs you to stand by her side as she fights against the GOP for our values.

[**_Please rush a donation right away to help us stay on track before our biggest deadline of the year._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c2d/622b7b5b/1efe54e0/307b4f58/981170360/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-march19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&amount=25&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=9+-+Please+rush+a+donation+right+away+to+hel&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190313_1_1")

Thank you,

Team DWS

name: Pamela Tucker
subject: Leaders Morse & Hinch will Spring to Victory! Will You?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTExMDE0MTQ4NzIxODc0NjIzJmM9dDd0NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMzc2MTMxMzImZD1wNXIxYTFs.AbGfmp1fBu3BVay7oUPqupiuyHp5Z8zVhlZf1cTp-BQ)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Derek, Good news! Senate Leader Chuck Morse and House Leader Dick Hinch will be joining us at the **_Spring to Victory_ _: 2020 Vision Reception_ with Special Guest Lara Trump in the Gate City of Nashua!******

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Senator Morse and Representative Hinch are fighting the good fight for Republican principles in Concord and are ready to lead their caucuses to sustain the **many** vetoes we can expect this term. Lara Trump is coming to the Granite State on **Tuesday, April 2nd,** and you're going to want to be there to celebrate our President, our party, and help the NHGOP build up for 2020.
[Order your tickets today!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTExMDE0MTQ4NzIxODc0NjIzJmM9dDd0NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMzc2MTMxMzQmZD12NmcydjRo.DyIq-x2fdD8Pq_32073Kjb4N_lLvjCc5gh3qh-9ECDs) **Our early-bird rate of $85 expires on March 25th!** This will be a major event this Spring. I look forward to seeing you there! We also have a VIP Reception & event sponsorships available, [which you can RSVP for right on our webpage!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTExMDE0MTQ4NzIxODc0NjIzJmM9dDd0NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMzc2MTMxMzYmZD14MG8xbDlk.-g_z_cLq1Uj_fa3iJBhbUW0KgXoq594P5HE4O-12dwI) Sincerely, Pamela Tucker
NHGOP Vice Chair

---
---
| |
---
| _**P.S. Our times have changed:** VIP Reception now starts at 5:00 PM and our General Reception starts at 6:30 PM, with registration opening an hour before._

name: Tina Smith
subject: Before the Senate votes tomorrow, add your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Join me in fighting against Trump's border wall.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-ja-march?refcode=rtw_20190313_em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") The Senate is voting _tomorrow_ to block Donald Trump's fake national emergency. **I 'm voting to block it, but I need to know you're with me. Add your name to reject Trump's abuse of power right now.** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d8fd/c1f7015/61181f39/114057b3/4273676124/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/StopTrumpsBorderEmergency/?code=tsmith&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-ja-march%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190313_em%26recurring%3Dauto")** Team, Tomorrow, the Senate will vote on blocking Donald Trump's national emergency declaration. Trump's abuse of power is unconstitutional. He is manufacturing chaos and dividing our country for political gain -- and I'm voting to stop it. We have seen Republicans go on the record against this, and we must keep up the pressure on the undecided Senators. **[We need to show we have the people power on our side in standing up to Trump, which means getting 10,000 signatures before the Senate votes tomorrow. Friend, will you join me in rejecting Trump's divisive border wall emergency? Add your name right now >>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d8fd/c1f7015/61181f39/114057b3/4273676124/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/StopTrumpsBorderEmergency/?code=tsmith&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-ja-march%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190313_em%26recurring%3Dauto")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d8fd/c1f7015/61181f39/114057b3/4273676124/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/StopTrumpsBorderEmergency/?code=tsmith&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-ja-march%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190313_em%26recurring%3Dauto") Earlier this year, Trump shut down the government for 35 days over funding for his border wall, hurting millions of working families. And now, he's ignoring Congress and repurposing billions of dollars to build a wall that the majority of Americans don't want. **It 's up to us to do everything we can to stop him.** **[Time is running out before the Senate votes, and I need to know you're standing with me. Will you add your name right now to reject Trump's national emergency?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d8fd/c1f7015/61181f39/114057b3/4273676124/VEsD/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/StopTrumpsBorderEmergency/?code=tsmith&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-ja-march%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190313_em%26recurring%3Dauto")** Fighting with you, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-ja-march?refcode=rtw_20190313_em-biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com]().
